body.title: Wire IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY=1 into daemon and igor.switches.cfg
body.result: IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY=1 in switches.cfg; worker_daemon.sh reads flag and passes --max-difficulty to cc_queue.py next. Commit 6380f152.
body.description:
Igor's daemon must pass its capability cap when asking for the next ticket so it only picks up Apprentice-tier work. Add `IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY=1` to `~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/igor.switches.cfg`. Update `worker_daemon.sh` to read `IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY` and pass `--max-difficulty=$IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY` when calling `cc_queue.py next`.

**Affected files:** ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/igor.switches.cfg, ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/worker_daemon.sh
**Design rules:** Switch-file pattern consistent with other IGOR_* flags; daemon reads config at loop start
**Scope boundary:** Config line + daemon shell script only. No cc_queue.py changes (those are in T-queue-next-difficulty).
**Test plan:** igor.switches.cfg contains IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY=1; worker_daemon.sh passes --max-difficulty=$IGOR_MAX_DIFFICULTY in the cc_queue next call; a manually-created difficulty=2 ticket is skipped by the daemon on next cycle.
